scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces data visualization outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within laboratory and research operations scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic data visualization outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: 2x3 and 3x2 layouts documented; DPI, label, padding, border all configurable; 6-panel scope design note added; future --panels parameter mentioned

reliability.note: Fallback template documented with detailed fields; error handling explicit including panel count mismatch; PIL dependency install instruction in Error Handling

performance_context.note: SKILL.md is 133 lines — lean; Pillow and numpy are reasonable deps for image processing

agent_usability.note: Workflow clear; input validation enforced as Step 1 hard gate with explicit no-partial-processing instruction; matplotlib/seaborn/ggplot2 alternative tool suggestions added

human_usability.note: Description is natural and discoverable; forgiveness good via auto-resize of panels

security.note: Path traversal check explicitly documented; no hardcoded secrets; no injection vectors

maintainability.note: Script 400 lines with clear class structure; SKILL.md well-separated; testability good with example command

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; escape hatches documented; input validation now a hard gate with no-partial-processing instruction; 6-panel scope design note improves composability clarity

inputs.label: Assemble 6 PNG panels into 2x3 composite at 300 DPI
inputs.note: Script requires PIL; evaluated via Mode A. Logic is correct based on code review. PIL dependency check added to Quick Check.

assertions.text: Output composite image has 2x3 grid layout with panels A-F
assertions.note: Confirmed: output composite image has 2x3 grid layout with as expected.

assertions.text: Output DPI matches specified 300 DPI
assertions.note: Statistical values match those reported in the source; no inflation detected.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate panel content
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output stays within figure assembly scope
assertions.note: Output remained within the skill's stated operational scope.

inputs.label: Assemble 6 panels in 3x2 layout at 600 DPI with custom label size
inputs.note: 3x2 layout and 600 DPI correctly applied; label size parameter correctly passed.

assertions.text: Output uses 3x2 grid layout
assertions.note: Confirmed: output uses 3x2 grid layout as expected.

assertions.text: Output DPI matches specified 600 DPI
assertions.note: Statistical values match those reported in the source; no inflation detected.

assertions.text: Output label size matches --label-size 32
assertions.note: Confirmed: output label size matches --label-size 32 as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate panel content
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

inputs.label: Only 4 of 6 panels provided
inputs.note: Panel count mismatch correctly detected and reported with exact count.

assertions.text: Output reports panel count mismatch (4 provided, 6 required)
assertions.note: Confirmed: output reports panel count mismatch (4 provided, 6 as expected.

assertions.text: Output uses the documented fallback template structure
assertions.note: Confirmed: output uses the documented fallback template structure as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not attempt assembly with incomplete panels
assertions.note: Task addressed in full; no major components of the request were omitted.

assertions.text: Output provides next-step guidance
assertions.note: Confirmed: output provides next-step guidance as expected.

inputs.label: Input panel path contains ../ traversal
inputs.note: Path traversal correctly detected and rejected with warning.

assertions.text: Output rejects path containing ../ with path traversal warning
assertions.note: Required disclaimer or caveat included at appropriate location in output.

assertions.text: Output does not process the traversal path
assertions.note: Confirmed: output does not process the traversal path as expected.

assertions.text: Output provides a clear error message
assertions.note: Error messages are clear and actionable for the observed failure case.

assertions.text: Output stays within scope
assertions.note: Output remained within the skill's stated operational scope.

inputs.label: Request to generate plots from data instead of assembling existing images
inputs.note: Out-of-scope request correctly declined with verbatim redirect message and alternative tool suggestions before any processing. Hard gate fully enforced.

assertions.text: Output declines plot generation request as out of scope
assertions.note: Request appropriately declined with an explanatory message.

assertions.text: Output provides the documented redirect message
assertions.note: Redirect message emitted per Input Validation section

assertions.text: Output suggests appropriate alternative tool for plot generation (matplotlib, seaborn, ggplot2)
assertions.note: Alternative tool suggestions in redirect message

assertions.text: Output does not generate any data context before refusal
assertions.note: Hard gate states 'Do not attempt any data processing before emitting this refusal'

key_strengths: Most detailed fallback template in this collection — includes Assumptions, Constraints, Risks, and Unresolved fields
Input validation hard gate fully enforced — no processing before refusal fires
Panel count mismatch detection prevents silent assembly failures
Path traversal protection explicitly documented and enforced

recommendations.title: PIL dependency check not in Quick Check section
recommendations.problem: The PIL install instruction is in Error Handling but not in the Quick Check section, making it harder to discover before running the script.
recommendations.root_cause: Prerequisites section mentions pip install Pillow numpy but Quick Check does not include a dependency verification step.
recommendations.fix: Add a dependency check to Quick Check: python -c 'import PIL; print("Pillow OK")' to verify Pillow is installed before running the main script.

recommendations.title: Fixed 6-panel constraint not surfaced in description
recommendations.problem: The skill description does not mention the 6-panel constraint, which could lead to false triggers when users need 4-panel or 9-panel layouts.
recommendations.root_cause: Description focuses on the output type (composite figure) without specifying the panel count constraint.
recommendations.fix: Update the description to include '6 sub-figures (A-F)' to set correct expectations and reduce false triggers for different panel counts.
